fault_hypothesis: The overlap check on line 76 uses non-strict inequalities (`<=`, `>=`), which incorrectly permits adjacent intervals. The failing tests require adjacent intervals to be treated as conflicts, so strict inequalities (`<`, `>`) should be used instead.

spec.expr: (end__1 <= s or start__1 >= e) == (end__1 < s or start__1 > e)

constraints.intent: The overlap check should treat adjacent intervals as conflicts.
Each existing interval must be strictly non-overlapping with the new interval.

spec.expr: all(interval[1] < s or interval[0] > e for s, e in existing)

constraints.intent: An accepted interval cannot be adjacent to any original booking.
